In the Balkans and many other smaller-language regions, children’s content is largely unusable without proper language synchronization (dubbing). Right now, parents are forced to sit next to their kids and translate every sentence manually — which completely defeats the purpose of children’s programming. There is some synchronized content available, but it’s buried and extremely hard to find. A simple “Dubbed in my language” filter would instantly solve this problem.
